interaction_phrase: in collaboration with Covestro
occurrence_sentence: HQS Quantum Simulations (HQS) announces the release of an update to its open-source tool, the Active Space Finder (ASF). Developed in collaboration with Covestro, a global player in the field of polymer materials, this update aims to enhance chemical simulations by simplifying the selection of active spaces in molecules.
